candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: At the instant just after the switches are thrown in the circuits shown in the figure, find the voltage v in the circuit of figure.

metadata.question_zh:
在将开关闭合到图1所示的电路中后的瞬间,求电容器两端的电压$v_C$。

<image 1>
